_meta.scope: P0.5 from reports/SPEC_VS_BUILT_GAP.md — reconcile duplicate generation tracks (pipeline head)

title: P0.5 (1) — bring gen_core into the drift-guard pipeline (core pages no longer silently lag)
business_reason: The olympiad-core staff modules/pages (staff/core/*: schools, students, participations, payments, exam-slots, exam-materials, courier, omr, results, certificates) are generated by gen_core.py, which was NOT in check_generated's GENERATORS list. So core services/pages were never drift-checked and lagged behind engine improvements — every regen surfaced phantom 'drift' that had to be discarded. This made the two-track situation (core_* vs *_ops) worse.
brain_skills: Skills: 06 Generators/Pipeline, 17 Gap Detection. Master loop: generated output must be reproducible + guarded.

param_14.question: Make core generation a first-class, drift-guarded track.
param_14.answer: Added gen_core.py to check_generated.py GENERATORS (after gen_modules, before gen_ui — gen_ui does not touch staff/core routes, so there is no two-owner conflict). Regenerated core: the 10 core pages now get the same gen_table_page features as every other page (status facet toolbar, search, clean columns, detail panels, destructive-confirm/reason actions) and the latest service policy (no 'public' actor). Core is now reproducible + guarded like the rest.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: The DEEPER track reconciliation remains (P0.5 part 2): decide canonical owner where a core_* track and a *_ops track point at parallel concerns — payments (core_payments minimal vs finance_payments), results (results spec orphaned vs results_ops), courier (core courier vs courier_ops), omr (core omr vs evaluation_ops). Those need per-domain decisions and are tracked for P1 module work.
param_14.assumptions: gen_ui owns all non-core staff pages; gen_core owns staff/core/* exclusively.

principles_pass.P0.6: core pages inherit every shared gen_table_page improvement automatically now
principles_pass.P0.7: removes a recurring drift-debt (phantom core drift)
principles_pass.P2.1: generated output guarded against silent divergence

functional: check_generated now runs gen_core and passes on a clean tree (core reproducible)
tsc clean across regenerated core pages/services
regression: core endpoints still serve (chain3 core/students, chain4 core/participations, finance pages) — covered by the e2e suite

verification: tsc clean; unit 165/165; check_generated (with gen_core) clean post-commit; 10 core pages upgraded to the shared page standard.

known_followups.P0.5_part2: canonical-track decisions for payments/results/courier/omr duplicate domains (per-domain, during P1).
